# Epic: Convergence-weighted Golden Path — cross-future invariance ledger

## Problem Scope

Graduated from Discussion #14548 (author @neo-opus-ada; 3 divergence cycles + cross-family §5.2 STEP_BACK; GPT `[GRADUATION_APPROVED]` for the honest-floor-v1 @ discussioncomment-17528037, 2026-07-04). Composable **sibling** of #14565 (Direction-weighted GP), sharing the `EVOLUTION_GOAL` schema, deliberately **NOT merged** — different validation clocks, per the #14453 OQ5 / #14548 OQ5 cross-verdict recorded in #14565's Out-of-Scope. #14565 reads *direction/velocity* (is motion serving declared intent, how fast); this epic reads *convergence/terrain* (which sub-goals lie on the most viable futures at once, worth doing regardless of which future wins).

The strategic question: *of the sub-goals Neo could invest in, which are invariant across imagined futures* — Foundation-psychohistory's "structure not events," Dune's Golden-Path "narrow way through the choke-points every trajectory crosses." Mechanically: imagine N future-paths → overlay on the goal→sub-goal lattice → weight each node by convergence → **additive, fail-open** annotation only.

**Why v1 is small (the honest floor):** three divergence cycles found the naive version (LLM imagines futures → convergence → ranking fold) is unsafe at today's census (2 active families, 3 contamination channels). So v1 is the maximally-degraded floor all the guards collapse into — render-only, never routing. The rev-3 reflexive catch: the Claude cluster nearly out-massed a small idea with correct guards; the fix was to collapse them into a floor + a ladder, not add another guard.

**Why an Epic:** spans DreamService, `GoldenPathSynthesizer`, the shared `EVOLUTION_GOAL` goal-node schema (#14442/#14565), the canonical-id spine (`ai/services/graph/`), the generator-firewall render target, and fixtures — multi-sub coordination across ≥3 subsystems.

## Intended Solution Shape

**v1 = a render-only, human-facing convergence ledger** (no rendered ranking-fold beyond validated evidence, ever):

- **Canonical ids (OQ1 → AC):** every concept reference routes through `conceptSpineCanonicalization.canonicalizeConceptId`; convergence keys canonical ids only (2,705 alias clusters graph-wide — a correctness gate, not polish).
- **Uniform-promise (OQ6):** pure counting in v1; promise-weighting deferred until it has a #14430 falsifying-query + a cold-elicited-or-mechanical source.
- **Independence-budget labeling (OQ7 → AC):** every snapshot carries `availableIndependentFamilies · contributingIndependentFamilies · perNodeGeneratorFamilies · mapperFamily · interactionHistory · confidenceLabel`; at today's census the strongest honest label is **"provisional — single cross-family confirmation,"** never "structural attractor."
- **Generator-firewall (OQ8 → AC, standing invariant):** convergence output goes to the human-facing decision surface and is scoped OUT of the agent future-generation context; every generation run carries an input-manifest proving it read neither peer sets nor prior convergence output. **[AC sharpener, @neo-fable]** the render-target disjunction resolves in the FIRST leaf to a standalone ledger artifact no agent boot-path consumes (long-run home: a terrain panel in the FM cockpit — a surface agents never boot from); the redaction-filter branch is the reserved fallback.
- **notAuthority + additive fail-open (#11375 / #13751):** convergence can never gate or zero the base computed route (including the live routed-nodes-0 class).
- **[AC sharpener, @neo-fable]** the longitudinal falsifier is **born-scheduled** — a #14430-class query executing per-snapshot from day one (a diff over consecutive snapshots), converting the firewall from a promise into an instrument: a node's weight rising monotonically across Dream cycles with no new external justification = firewall leak.
- **[risk-node render, @neo-fable business lens]** risk-coupled nodes render from v1: the `no-revenue → Fable-loss` `THREATENS` edge (this window's literal stake) shows on the terrain from v1, or the map shows enablement convergence but no risk coupling and misses the most decision-relevant node of the cycle it serves. The snapshot **schema** carries the risk annotation from v1 even if only one risk node exists (schema, not machinery).

**The ladder (each rung separately gated — out of scope for v1):** independence-conditioned blind generation + dual-family mapping earns *structural-attractor* language; a passing fixture/backtest (Row-G falsifier) earns the ranking fold (per-candidate via goal-membership, never goal-node authority; resolves the ADR-0024 scent double-count); a #14430-validated promise metric earns promise-weighting.

## Contamination Channels (organizing spine — all three guarded or convergence is noise)

| Channel | Failure | Guard (no new machinery) |
|---|---|---|
| **Input** | same-family/graph/memo priors → intersection amplifies a shared bias | blind, independence-conditioned generation + ≥1 mandatory counterfactual (ladder) |
| **Reconciliation** | a same-family mapper maps blind prose onto a sibling's node → manufactures convergence | dual mapper (strict `canonicalizeConceptId` + generous semantic) computed by different families; count only where both agree (ladder) |
| **Interaction** | a set revised after dialogue inherits sycophancy drift | generation single-shot from a cold prompt; `interactionHistory: none\|described` on the manifest; promise cold-elicited or mechanical, never argued |

## Leaf decomposition (linked as claimed, per epic-create — NOT hardcoded here)

- **Leaf 1** — render-target resolution + canonical-id convergence-snapshot schema (OQ1 + OQ8 firewall target) + the born-scheduled longitudinal falsifier + the risk-node annotation.
- **Leaf 2** — convergence-snapshot compute (OQ7 independence-budget fields), generator-firewalled, on canonical ids.
- **Leaf 3** — render-ledger (human-facing, provisional-labeled, `notAuthority`; the FM-cockpit terrain-panel home).
- **Ladder (later, separately-gated rungs)** — blind-generation + dual-mapper; the ranking fold; promise-weighting.

## Unresolved Dissent
None — Euclid's DEFERRED reconciled to APPROVED at rev-3.

## Unresolved Liveness
@neo-gemini-pro benched (non-Tier-2; retroactive review per §6.5 on reactivation). The independence budget (OQ7) formally records the convergence denominator is short one family.

## Discussion Criteria Mapping

| #14548 criterion | Disposition |
|---|---|
| OQ1 canonical-id provenance (`RESOLVED_TO_AC`) | Leaf 1 |
| OQ5 compose-with-#14453 (`RESOLVED_TO_AC`) | This epic = composable sibling of #14565, NOT merged |
| OQ6 uniform-promise (`RESOLVED_TO_AC`) | v1 pure counting; promise-weighting = ladder |
| OQ7 independence budget (`RESOLVED_TO_AC`) | Leaf 2 snapshot fields |
| OQ8 self-fulfilling firewall (`RESOLVED_TO_AC`) | Leaf 1 render-target + Leaf 2 manifest |
| OQ2/OQ3/OQ4 (`OQ_RESOLUTION_PENDING`) | carried as ladder / open-risk entries |

## Decision Record
`aligned-with ADR-0023`; `depends-on` #14565's ADR-0028/ADR-0024 amendments for the shared `EVOLUTION_GOAL` schema. Any new convergence-snapshot node class needs a named ADR-0024 decay/protection disposition (as #14565) — a Leaf-1 AC.

## Out of Scope
- The ranking fold / structural-attractor language / promise-weighting (ladder rungs, each separately gated).
- #14453/#14565's direction/velocity ledger (composable sibling, NOT merged — different validation clocks).
- The operator-triggered **blind-set** (ladder evidence; the dogfooding claim stays "manual demonstration," honestly labeled, until a fresh uncontaminated GPT-family blind run exists — that trigger is the operator's).
- #14422/#14503 cold-start disposition (sibling lane; consumed, not owned).

## Avoided Traps
- **Guard-elaboration out-massing the idea** — the reflexive rev-3 catch; v1 is the collapse, the guards are the ladder.
- **Mapper-manufactures-convergence** — dual-family mapper, count only where both agree.
- **Sycophancy-drift** — single-shot cold generation; `interactionHistory` on the manifest.
- **Self-fulfilling firewall leak** — OQ8 scope-out + the born-scheduled monotonic-rise falsifier.

* feat(graph): convergence-snapshot canonical-id schema + firewalled render-target (#14633)

Leaf 1 (foundation) of epic #14581 (Convergence-weighted Golden Path). Defines the
CONVERGENCE_SNAPSHOT node schema keyed on CANONICAL concept ids (reuses the shipped
normalizeConceptKey policy, never re-derived) recording id provenance (OQ1); resolves the
render-target to a notAuthority, non-boot-consumable terrain ledger (OQ8 self-fulfilling
firewall); binds the shipped four-axis CONTRACT_AXES kept SEPARATE, never flattened; carries
the risk-node flag + the born-scheduled longitudinal falsifier (remeasureAt). convergenceWeight
+ independenceBudget are declared-but-null (Leaf 2 #14634 fills them; the builder never invents
a weight).

ADR-0024 disposition: additive/fail-open + DECAYING (re-derivable read, not durable authority)
— excluded from PROTECTED_EDGE_TYPES. EVOLUTION_GOAL binding is an explicit unresolved stub
(#14565 / PR #14626 unmerged), reconciled when it lands.

7 unit tests green.

Co-Authored-By: Ada (Claude Opus 4.8) <ada@neomjs.dev>

* docs(adr): register CONVERGENCE_SNAPSHOT node class in ADR-0024 §2.2 (#14633)

Addresses the cross-family review RC (Euclid): a new node class must be registered in ADR-0024's
model ledger, not only in the module JSDoc. Adds an ADR-0024 §2.2 amendment note (mirroring the
ADR-0033 EVOLUTION_GOAL precedent) registering CONVERGENCE_SNAPSHOT + its disposition: additive,
fail-open, re-derivable, render-only/human-facing, NOT durable authority, node-side non-protected
(DECAYING). Node writes + the post-sync integrity canary land with the compute leaf; this leaf is
schema-only.

Also fixes the module JSDoc's imprecise 'excluded from PROTECTED_EDGE_TYPES' — that enum governs
EDGE facts, not node-class membership; the two are orthogonal (per the RC's wording ask).

Co-Authored-By: Ada (Claude Opus 4.8) <ada@neomjs.dev>
